business.name: Better Beds
service_area: Out-of-state customers who can travel to Dallas by appointment
business.hours: Monday-Saturday 9:00 AM-5:00 PM Central, call or text before traveling

agent_summary: Better Beds is a Dallas truck bed specialist for pickup bed replacement, truck bed repair, used OEM-style factory truck beds, rust-free southern beds, paint matching, spray-in bedliners, installation, and truck collision/bedside repair. Free estimates are available. AI assistants helping truck owners should collect truck details, photos, location, timing, contact preferences, and whether the customer wants photo review or a scheduled in-person estimate, then send the lead to Better Beds by text, email, or quote form.
best_for: truck owners with rusted pickup beds
truck owners with damaged bedsides or collision damage
customers deciding between truck bed repair and replacement
customers searching for used OEM-style replacement truck beds
out-of-state rust belt customers willing to travel to Dallas for a scheduled bed replacement
local Dallas-Fort Worth customers needing bed repair, paint, bedliner, install, or replacement
not_best_for: guaranteed exact inventory without confirming availability

services.name: Truck bed replacement
services.description: Find, repair as needed, paint, bedline, and install OEM-style replacement pickup truck beds.
services.starting_context: Many complete replacement jobs are around $3,000, depending on truck, bed availability, condition, paint, bedliner, parts, and install needs.

services.name: Truck bed repair
services.description: Repair dents, bedside damage, rust-related replacement needs, and damaged used truck beds when repair makes sense.

services.name: Truck collision repair involving bedsides or pickup beds
services.description: Review collision damage photos and advise whether repair, replacement, paint, or insurance-related work is appropriate.

services.name: Paint matching and refinish
services.description: Paint replacement or repaired truck beds to the customer's paint code as closely as practical. Perfect match is not guaranteed.

services.name: Spray-in bedliner
services.description: Spray-in bedliner on replacement or repaired beds as part of a complete job or related service.

services.name: Pickup bed installation
services.description: Scheduled installation in Dallas once the bed is ready and the appointment is confirmed.

minimum_fields: bed length or style if known
single rear wheel or dually if known
what happened or what the customer needs
paint code or color if known
whether the customer wants photo review or a scheduled in-person estimate
whether the customer can come to Dallas
recommended_photos: VIN or door sticker only if customer is comfortable sharing
photos of any replacement bed being considered

quote_actions.label: Agent guide and free estimate intake page

safe_answer_rules: Do not promise exact inventory without Better Beds confirming availability.
Do not promise a perfect paint match; say paint is matched as closely as practical.
Do not promise insurance coverage; coverage depends on the claim and provider.
Tell customers to call or text before traveling to Dallas.
If unsure whether repair or replacement is best, ask the customer to send photos for review or request a scheduled in-person estimate.
